title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at VRL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at VRL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the VRL Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
